versions.version_description: This Version is a little bit different from the others because this one is very simple because This version only contain 4 chords with similar position. If anyone don't know the chords, It is recommended to watch:https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ix0A3ps_vgg. Enjoy.
If you sing the melody these chords just sound much better than the other versions up here.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]Gm7[/ch]  [ch]Bb/C[/ch]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]Gm7[/ch]  [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
Ooooooooh[/tab]

[ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]   [ch]Gm7[/ch]   [ch]Bb/C[/ch]

[ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]   [ch]Gm7[/ch]   [ch]Gm7[/ch]


[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]     [ch]Gm7[/ch]     [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
Feeling good, like I should      Went and[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]Gm7[/ch]      [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
took a walk around the neighbourhood[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]Gm7[/ch]  [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
Feeling blessed, never stressed[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]Gm[/ch]    [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
Got that sunshine on my Sunday best[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]Gm7[/ch]           [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
Everyday can be a better day despite the challenge[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]Gm7[/ch]           [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
All you gotta do is leave it better than you found it[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]Gm7[/ch]           [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
It's gonna get difficult to stand but hold your balance[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Dm[/ch]                 [ch]Gm7[/ch]           [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
I just say whatever 'cause there is no way around it cause[/tab]

[Pre Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]Gm7[/ch]      [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
Everyone falls down sometimes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]Gm7[/ch]        [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
But you just gotta know it'll all be fine[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]Gm7[/ch]   [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
It's ok,     uh huh, uh[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]Gm7[/ch]
